title: Lemons
description: Explosive lemons, because Cave Johnson said to make them
body:
When life gives you lemons don't make lemonade

When life gives me MCreator I make lemon-ades

Adds an exploding lemon, that's kinda it
(mod version 1.1 is creative only)
 

Lemons drawn by me

 

~~Cover image by firefly, Google images and me in Photoshop~~

Go ahead with modpacks, just link back
